text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm at the park...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Always be marvelous, no matter<n>when or where!
☆ You and me, we're<n>both marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yoo-hoo! Today and tomorrow will be<n>marvelous!
☆ Oh, you're maaarvelous<n>too! ★
choice_data_list: So what's with you and "marvelous" again?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What?! Don't you know? Marvelous<n>is just that!
Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what kind of response I<n>was
expecting, but the one I get from<n>Marvelous
Sunday is beyond<n>perplexing...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
There's not enough marvelousness<n>in this
world! What can I do to make it<n>more so?
choice_data_list: Throw everything you've got at it?

Maybe chill out a little and let things happen as
they will?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Everything I've got? You don't haveto tell me twice! Vroom, vroom!Vaaa-vrooom!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Look! I can run nonstop now!<n>Ahahaha! ☆
Ahahaha! ★

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what's happening, butI do have a smile on my faceafter that.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Chill, huh? Well, if that's what you<n>want, I'll
show you chill!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna chillax so hard, it won't be<n>long
before the world becomes cooler<n>than ice!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, now I've got a big craving for<n>some cool
shaved ice! C'mon, let's<n>go! ☆ Ahahaha! ★

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what's happening, butI do have a smile on my faceafter that.
